settings_mfa_section_desc: Require a one-time code after password or external identity sign-in.
settings_mfa_empty_desc: Add an authenticator app before password sign-ins require a second step.
settings_mfa_setup_desc: Connect an authenticator, verify a code, then save recovery codes.
settings_mfa_intro_desc: You will add AsterDrive to an authenticator app. MFA is not enabled until the final verification succeeds.
settings_mfa_intro_app_desc: Use 1Password, Bitwarden, Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or a similar app.
settings_mfa_intro_recovery_desc: The last step generates a one-time recovery code file for signing in if you lose the device.
settings_mfa_intro_password_desc: Only the 6-digit code from your authenticator is required; your current password is not requested again.
settings_mfa_scan_desc: Add a new account in your authenticator app and scan this QR code. If scanning is not available, enter the secret manually.
settings_mfa_verify_desc: Your authenticator generates a new 6-digit code about every 30 seconds. MFA is enabled after this code is accepted.
settings_mfa_disable_missing_factor: MFA is already disabled. Refresh the settings and try again if needed.
settings_mfa_disable_desc: Password and external identity sign-ins will no longer require a second factor for this account.
settings_mfa_regenerate_desc: Existing unused recovery codes stop working after regeneration.
settings_mfa_sensitive_action_desc: Confirm with either a TOTP code or an unused recovery code.
settings_mfa_recovery_codes_desc: Download or copy these codes now. They are shown only once and each code works one time.
settings_mfa_recovery_confirm_title: I downloaded or saved these recovery codes
settings_mfa_recovery_confirm_desc: You cannot view this exact set again after closing. Save them in a password manager, encrypted note, or another safe place first.
